title: A Performance Budget for Portfolio Sites
content: A portfolio site should open instantly and stay responsive. I use a simple budget: minimal JavaScript, optimized images, and one style entry point.
The budget drives decisions. If a dependency does not move user value, it is removed. This keeps the build small and startup cost low.
Measure first contentful paint and total transferred bytes after every change. Numbers keep the project honest and prevent accidental bloat.
A fast portfolio is more than engineering pride. It communicates product judgment and attention to detail.
